p1_singleprompt.rationale: Names generated from parametric memory; no corpus link, no evidence, reasoning is unverifiable model text.

p2_rag.rationale: Picks are grounded in retrieved corpus documents (IDs traceable), but there is no per-constraint verdict and no quoted evidence.

suppliermind.rationale: Per-constraint compliance verdicts with quoted evidence (quote-or-fail), ReAct trace and audit log per query.
